name: How much does mold remediation cost and what factors affect the price?

mainEntity.name: How much does mold remediation cost and what factors affect the price?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mold remediation costs vary widely based on the size of the affected area, the type of mold, and the extent of damage, often ranging from $1,000 to $10,000+ for residential projects. You should ask for a full cost breakdown including inspection fees, labor, and material disposal to avoid surprise fees.
acceptedAnswer.description: Costs range from $1,000-$10,000+ depending on area size, mold type, and damage; get a full breakdown.

description: Costs range from $1,000-$10,000+ depending on area size, mold type, and damage; get a full breakdown.
